## MVP Measurement Contract

| Signal | Target | Instrumentation | False Positive To Avoid |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Activation criteria |  |  | Signups without activation |
| Day 7 retention |  |  | Launch curiosity without repeat use |
| Day 30 retention |  |  | Short-term incentive usage |
| Revenue or qualified willingness to pay |  |  | Compliments without budget |
| Referral or organic pull |  |  | Founder-driven outreach only |
